overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic riverbank. The clip features a dramatic weather transition from bright sunny afternoon through golden hour sunset to a dark stormy atmosphere, with the character exploring the shoreline and observing the changing landscape.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the riverbank through tall grass and purple wildflowers, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: Large mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible across the calm river
Calm reflective water surface mirroring the blue sky and mountains
Grassy bank with purple lupine flowers and white wildflowers
Dense tree line on the horizon beyond the meadow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day with Geralt walking along a picturesque riverbank. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance across the calm water, while wildflowers dot the grassy shore. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves through the natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open riverbank during golden hour sunset

events.description: Sunlight shifts to intense golden hour, casting orange glow across the landscape
Character turns left to face inland, observing the sunset-lit hills and distant structures

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns to survey the inland landscape bathed in warm golden light, then turns back toward the river

entered.detail: Rolling hills illuminated by the setting sun with warm orange lighting

segments.scene_description: As the sun begins to set, the lighting shifts to a dramatic golden hour with intense orange hues. Geralt turns inland to observe the landscape, revealing grassy hills and distant structures silhouetted against the bright sky, before turning back toward the river as storm clouds begin to gather on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy riverbank with gathering dark clouds

events.description: Weather transitions to stormy with dark clouds covering the sky and wind visible in the vegetation

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the shore as the wind picks up and storm clouds darken the sky

entered.detail: Dark heavy storm clouds covering the mountain peaks and creating dramatic shadows

segments.scene_description: The atmosphere shifts dramatically as storm clouds roll in, darkening the sky and changing the lighting to a moody diffused gray. Geralt continues his journey along the riverbank as the wind becomes visible in the swaying grass and choppy water surface, with the snow-capped mountains now framed by threatening clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stormy waterfront with choppy waves

events.description: Character stops walking to look around at the stormy landscape and darkening sky

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses to survey the stormy river and darkening sky, standing still for a moment before continuing

changed.detail: Water becomes significantly choppier with visible whitecaps from the storm wind

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the storm reaches its peak with dark clouds covering the sky and low light conditions. Geralt stops to observe the dramatic weather, watching the choppy waves on the river before continuing his walk along the windswept shore as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverbank that transforms from a bright, sunny afternoon into a dark and turbulent storm. It begins with Geralt walking through a picturesque landscape of wildflowers and calm waters, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. As the sun sets, the lighting shifts into a dramatic golden hour of intense orange hues, and the camera pans inland toward silhouetted hills before turning back to the river as storm clouds gather on the horizon. The atmosphere then shifts to a moody, diffused gray as the clouds roll in, causing the grass to sway and the water surface to become choppy. Finally, the sky darkens completely under the peak of the storm, leaving the character to observe the crashing waves before continuing his walk along the windswept shore.
